title: GPT-2 Paper
description: Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners — the original GPT-2 paper that demonstrated large language models can perform downstream tasks without explicit supervision.

title: InstructGPT Paper
description: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions with Human Feedback — introduces RLHF to align language models with human intent.

title: DeepSeek-R1 Paper
description: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning — demonstrates how RL can unlock chain-of-thought reasoning without supervised fine-tuning.

title: Llama 3 Paper
description: The Llama 3 Herd of Models — Meta's open-weight LLM family covering 8B to 405B parameters with multilingual and multimodal capabilities.

title: GPT-2 Source Code
description: Official OpenAI repository containing the GPT-2 model code, weights, and encoding utilities.

title: Karpathy's LLM.c
description: Reproducing GPT-2 (124M) in llm.c in 90 minutes for $20 — Andrej Karpathy's deep dive into training LLMs from scratch in pure C.

title: UltraChat Dataset
description: Large-scale multi-round instruction dialogue dataset with 1.5M conversations for training open-source chat models.

title: Deep Dive into LLMs like ChatGPT
description: Andrej Karpathy's comprehensive walkthrough of how LLMs work — from tokenization and pretraining to RLHF and inference.

title: QZero — Mastering Go without Search
description: Introduces QZero, a model-free RL approach that masters Go using self-play and experience replay without Monte-Carlo Tree Search — reaching AlphaGo-level play on just 7 GPUs.

title: On the Biology of a Large Language Model
description: Anthropic's circuit tracing research on Claude 3.5 Haiku — uses attribution graphs to reveal how LLMs perform multi-step reasoning, planning, and multilingual processing internally.

title: Tiktokenizer
description: Interactive tokenizer explorer — visualise how text is split into tokens by different OpenAI models in real time.

title: LLM Visualization
description: Interactive 3D visualisation of a neural network — walk through each layer of a transformer model step by step.

title: Lambda AI
description: GPU cloud platform offering on-demand and reserved NVIDIA clusters for training and inference workloads.

title: Model Context Protocol
description: Anthropic's open standard for connecting AI assistants to external tools, data sources, and APIs in a composable way.

title: Writing Tools for Agents
description: Anthropic's guide to building tool-use capabilities for Claude — covers tool definitions, schemas, and best practices.

title: Tau-Bench
description: Agent evaluation benchmark by Sierra Research — tests LLM agents on real-world tool-use tasks across retail and airline domains.

title: AI Agent Architecture — Practical Guide
description: Hands-on guide covering common agent design patterns including ReAct, plan-and-execute, and multi-agent orchestration.

title: AI Agent Architecture — Redis Blog
description: Overview of AI agent architecture patterns with a focus on memory, state management, and tool integration at scale.
